case_title: NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT VS LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS $1,700.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,740.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT NANCE IS ORDERD TO RETURN TO LANE ALL PROPERTY BE- LONGING TO LANE WHICH NANCE HAS, INCLUDING ALL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.50 FILED BY NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT AS TO DEFENDANT LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,350.00 FILED BY LANE DORRIE DBA HOUSE O'CHICKS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF NANCE JOYCE A.DBA VIDEO CAT
ORIGINAL FOOTAGE, DUB MASTERS AND BOXES. NANCE TO RETURN THE ITEMS BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS 2/16/96.
